questions.question: What units make up the Newton (force)?
questions.explanation: Force = mass × acceleration = kg × (m/s²) = kg·m/s². This is the Newton.

questions.question: A Joule is made from base units by multiplying and dividing.
questions.explanation: Yes! Joule = kg·m²/s². All derived units are made from combinations of the 7 base units.
